title: Living Hope
story:
A farmer once planted seeds during a dry season.

Day after day, the ground looked unchanged. There were no green shoots. There was no visible growth.

People around him began to question him.

“Why continue? Nothing is happening.”

But the farmer calmly replied,

“Just because I cannot see it yet, does not mean nothing is happening.”

Weeks later, the rains came. Suddenly, the field was full of life.

What was invisible before had been growing all along.

In our lives, hope works the same way.

We may not see immediate results. But when we trust God, He is working within us.

He fills us with joy and peace.

And slowly, that quiet trust grows into a strong and living hope.
life_lesson:
Hope is not based on what you see.

It is built on trusting God, even when nothing seems to change.

When you trust Him, He fills your heart with joy and peace.
prayer:
Dear Heavenly Father,

Thank You for being the source of hope in my life.

Even when I cannot see what You are doing, help me to trust You.

Fill my heart with Your joy and peace.

Strengthen me through Your Holy Spirit.

Let hope rise within me each day.

In Jesus' name,
Amen.
reflection_question:
What situation is making you feel hopeless today?

Are you trusting God, even when you cannot see results?

What step can you take today to rest in His peace?
verse:
May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace as you trust in Him.
So that you may overflow with hope by the power of the Holy Spirit.
